note: Barking Heads and Meowing Heads are the same company's dog/cat sub-brands, sold from one site. All four flavours share an identical recipe skeleton (93% named meats, same broth/oil/mineral base, identical analytical constituents and additive doses) — only the named meat blend and its percentages differ.

products.name: Paw Lickin' Chicken Wet Cat Food
products.composition_raw: 93% Chicken & Beef - Includes - Fresh Deboned Chicken (43%), Chicken Broth (25%), Fresh Deboned Beef (25%), Sunflower oil, Salmon oil, Minerals
products.analytical_constituents_raw: Crude Protein 11%, Crude Fat 5%, Crude Fibres 1.5%, Crude Ash 0.5%, Moisture 80%
products.additives_per_kg_raw: Amino Acids: Taurine 800mg. Vitamins: Vitamin D3 240IU, Vitamin E (DL-Alpha-Tocopheryl Acetate) 95mg, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) 550mg. Trace Elements: Zinc (as Zinc Chelate of Glycine Hydrate) 13mg, Copper (as Copper Sulphate Pentahydrate) 2mg, Manganese (as Manganese Sulphate Monohydrate) 0.5mg, Iodine (as Calcium Iodate Anhydrous) 0.4mg.
products.description_raw: A delectable chicken dinner, slow-cooked to purr-fection; grain-free; 93% chicken & beef. Previously named "Hey Good Looking".
products.free_from_claim_raw: FREE FROM ARTIFICIAL COLOURS, FLAVOURS & PRESERVATIVES
products.fetch_notes: Composition/analytics/additives supplied directly by the user from the live page and cross-verified by an independent WebFetch of the same URL — identical.

products.name: Top-Cat Turkey Wet Cat Food
products.composition_raw: 93% Turkey, Beef & Chicken includes – Fresh Deboned Turkey (28%), Fresh Deboned Beef (25%), Turkey Broth (25%), Fresh Deboned Chicken (15%), Sunflower Oil, Salmon Oil, Minerals
products.analytical_constituents_raw: Crude Protein 11%, Crude Fat 5%, Crude Fibres 1.5%, Crude Ash 0.4%, Moisture 80%
products.additives_per_kg_raw: Taurine 800 mg. Vitamins: Vitamin D3 240 IU, Vitamin E (DL-Alpha-Tocopheryl Acetate) 95 mg, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) 550 mg. Trace Elements: Zinc Chelate 13mg, Manganese Sulphate 0.5 mg, Copper Sulphate 2mg, Calcium Iodate 0.4mg.
products.description_raw: A triumph of turkey, slow-cooked to purr-fection; grain-free recipe with 93% turkey, beef, and chicken.
products.free_from_claim_raw: FREE FROM ARTIFICIAL COLOURS, FLAVOURS & PRESERVATIVES
products.fetch_notes: Crude Ash 0.4% here vs 0.5% for Paw Lickin' Chicken — otherwise identical analytical constituents; worth noting as the only measured difference between flavours.
